function.name: get_uv_index
function.description: Get current and daily UV index for a city.
function.long_description: Retrieves UV index details, including current UV index and daily peak UV values, for a specified city using an external weather API.

city.description: Name of the city to get UV index details for

example_user_queries: What is the UV index in London right now?
Get UV index for New York
Show today's UV index in Chennai
Is UV high today in Paris?
Check UV index forecast for Berlin
